# External Assets

These files are downloaded into the project so DateDrop does not hotlink third-party media at runtime.

## PNG

- `public/images/external/romantic-dinner-unsplash.png`
  - Source: Unsplash search result image `photo-1513279922550-250c2129b13a`
  - Source page: https://unsplash.com/s/photos/romantic-dinner
  - License: https://unsplash.com/license

## SVG

- `public/assets/external/heart-handshake-tabler.svg`
  - Source: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/icons/outline/heart-handshake.svg
  - License: MIT, https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/LICENSE

- `public/assets/external/glass-full-tabler.svg`
  - Source: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/icons/outline/glass-full.svg
  - License: MIT, https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/LICENSE

- `public/assets/external/flower-tabler.svg`
  - Source: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/icons/outline/flower.svg
  - License: MIT, https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons/blob/master/LICENSE
